Notice Of Motion And Motion To Correct Error In Rejecting Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.'s Motion To Correct Error In Rejecting Renewal Of Judgment.

Assignee of record Sacor Financial, Inc.'s motion to correct error in rejecting renewal of judgment is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

The Court will sign the proposed order. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
